intrinsics_csv:
<HEADER>	Intrinsic	Argument preparation	AArch64 Instruction	Result	Supported architectures
<SECTION>	Basic intrinsics	The intrinsics in this section are guarded by the macro ``__ARM_NEON``.
uint8x16_t vaddq_u8(uint8x16_t a, uint8x16_t b)	a -> Vn.16B;b -> Vm.16B	ADD Vd.16B,Vn.16B,Vm.16B	Vd.16B -> result	v7/A32/A64
float32x4_t vaddq_f32(float32x4_t a, float32x4_t b)	a -> Vn.4S;b -> Vm.4S	FADD Vd.4S,Vn.4S,Vm.4S	Vd.4S -> result	v7/A32/A64
<SECTION>	Basic intrinsics	The intrinsics in this section are guarded by the macro ``__ARM_NEON``.
uint64x2_t vaddw_high_u32(uint64x2_t a, uint32x4_t b)	a -> Vn.2D;b -> Vm.4S	UADDW2 Vd.2D,Vn.2D,Vm.4S	Vd.2D -> result	A64

#### Add ##### Addition | Intrinsic | Argument preparation | AArch64 Instruction | Result | Supported architectures | | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | | uint8x16_t vaddq_u8(
     uint8x16_t a,
     uint8x16_t b) | `a -> Vn.16B`
`b -> Vm.16B` | `ADD Vd.16B,Vn.16B,Vm.16B` | `Vd.16B -> result` | `v7/A32/A64` | | float32x4_t vaddq_f32(
     float32x4_t a,
     float32x4_t b) | `a -> Vn.4S`
`b -> Vm.4S` | `FADD Vd.4S,Vn.4S,Vm.4S` | `Vd.4S -> result` | `v7/A32/A64` | ##### Widening addition | Intrinsic | Argument preparation | AArch64 Instruction | Result | Supported architectures | | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | | uint64x2_t vaddw_high_u32(
     uint64x2_t a,
     uint32x4_t b) | `a -> Vn.2D`
`b -> Vm.4S` | `UADDW2 Vd.2D,Vn.2D,Vm.4S` | `Vd.2D -> result` | `A64` |
acle_markdown:
### Mapping of SVE instructions to intrinsics

| **Instruction**                      | **Intrinsic** |
| ------------------------------------ | ------------- |
| ADD (vectors, predicated)            | [`svadd`](https://developer.arm.com/architectures/instruction-sets/intrinsics/#f:@navigationhierarchiesreturnbasetype=[uint,int]&q=svadd[) |
| SADDLB                               | [`svaddlb`](https://developer.arm.com/architectures/instruction-sets/intrinsics/#f:@navigationhierarchiesreturnbasetype=[int]&q=svaddlb[) |
| UADDLB                               | [`svaddlb`](https://developer.arm.com/architectures/instruction-sets/intrinsics/#f:@navigationhierarchiesreturnbasetype=[uint]&q=svaddlb[) |

#### ADD, SUB

Integer add and subtract over predicated vectors.

``` c
svint32_t svadd[_s32]_z(svbool_t pg, svint32_t op1, svint32_t op2);
svint32_t svadd[_s32]_x(svbool_t pg, svint32_t op1, svint32_t op2);
```

#### SADDLB, UADDLB

Widen the bottom halves of byte vectors and add the widened values.

``` c
svint16_t svaddlb[_s16](svint8_t op1, svint8_t op2);
```

extra_intrinsics.name: svadd_s32_z
extra_intrinsics.signature: svint32_t svadd_s32_z(svbool_t pg, svint32_t op1, svint32_t op2)
extra_intrinsics.description: Add 32-bit SVE lanes under predicate control, zeroing inactive elements.

extra_intrinsics.name: svaddlb_s16
extra_intrinsics.description: Add widened bottom halves of signed 8-bit lanes.
